description: Basic functionality is great, advanced functionality is not intuitive
author: Ben E.
pros: Carbon Black Endpoint is an excellent endpoint security solution that provides comprehensive protection against a wide range of threats. Its advanced threat detection capabilities and real-time response capabilities make it an ideal choice for organizations that require robust and reliable security. The platform is easy to deploy and manage, and its intuitive interface makes it easy for IT teams to monitor and respond to security incidents.
cons: While Carbon Black Endpoint is a powerful security solution, it can be quite resource-intensive and may cause performance issues on older systems. Additionally, the platform's advanced features can be difficult for less experienced IT teams to configure and manage, which may result in misconfigured settings and potential security vulnerabilities. Finally, the platform's pricing can be quite high, making it less accessible for smaller organizations with limited budgets.

review_title: Great product for a company that values security
author: Alex K.
pros: We like the user interface and management portal and felt like it was very intuitive.
cons: We felt like certain items were not being detected but other EDRs also didn't detect them.

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: High Detection Rate Stable and Secure One of the best engines in the market
cons: Commands a premium pricing Expensive professional services Requires specialists to operate
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Tighter Security than others, but also more false positives...
description: Better protection from zero-day threats for our business critical workstations and servers.
author: Boone D.
pros: While not involved in the setup of the software, I do handle white-listing and installing the AV on new workstations. These tasks are easily accomplished through the online portal. I can also easily place a workstation or server in bypass mode to troubleshoot issues and determine if Carbon Black is the root cause.
cons: The predictive nature of Carbon Black lends itself well to zero-day threats, however it also results in many legitimate processes being blocked. Especially when CB is first setup and is learning your environment.

review_title: Carbon Black was a game changer.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: What I like most about this software is its ease of use and real-time scanning. It has routinely identified potential threats in a fraction of the time our previous security software did.
cons: What I liked least about the software is that it sometimes provides false positives with items as small as the installation of a piece of software like DropBox. That being said, I much prefer being over-informed than under.

description: Besides that everything is online cloud based antivirus that is very computer friendly with other softwares and programs.
author: Manny P.
pros: Uses less than 1% of your resources when installed and active. It's the future of antivirus that can basically draw out a recent malware on virus attack on a network and give you the opportunity to shut down it's movement immediately. It easily maps out on how the infection gradly infected other systems.
cons: No telling how effective this system will be unless you have a real world situation occur in your organization. And then you will see if it was worth the expense.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: I love this predictive security service
description: So far is the best experience I have had so far with a security software. This is one step ahead from definition base AV.
author: Jorge P.
pros: I like that is more accurate than any other AV available in the market since is base in behavior. We started using it an our false-positive decrease immediately. It is an amazing service.
cons: It takes a while to setup all the rules but it is worth it.

description: One of the best solutions to monitor your endpoint security
author: sunny J.
pros: Root cause analysis feature is great. The security feed which this product leverages from data analytics is amazing
cons: It's not ideal to monitor air tight environment as the product is cloud based otherwise one excellent product
